dict.string: P00RIJA Cryptography uses the camera for secure chat video calls and supported device-authentication workflows.
P00RIJA Cryptography uses the microphone for secure chat calls and voice messages.
P00RIJA Cryptography uses local authentication to unlock the app faster on supported devices.
P00RIJA Cryptography needs user-selected file access to encrypt, decrypt, share, and securely delete files.
P00RIJA Cryptography needs user-selected file access to save encrypted and decrypted output.
